message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #888888
}

' Participants
participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as MA #B9D7F5
participant "API" as API #E9E9F6
participant "api / Handler" as H #E9E9F6
participant "Application Layer\n(domain / service / facade)" as AL #E9E9F6
participant "TigerBeetle Client" as TBC #DFF0D8
participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as TBS #DFF0D8
database "MySQL" as MYSQL

' Group headers (as in diagram)
box "Central-Settlement" #FFFDF2
  participant API
  participant H
  participant AL
end box

box "Storage" #F3FFF3
  participant TBC
  participant TBS
  database MYSQL
end box

' Top explanatory notes
note left of MA
Hub operator or
DFSP interactions
end note

note right of API
NodeJS interface
invokes REST API
end note

note right of H
JSON request decoded &
processed via handler
end note

note right of AL
Expose service functions &
handle database interactions
end note

' Main interaction frame
group Update Settlement
  MA -> API : 1 JSON\n(settlement data)
  API -> H  : 2 Invoke handler
  H  -> AL  : 3 Invoke application layer

  AL -> MYSQL : 4 Retrieve settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
  AL -> TBC   : 5 Retrieve accounts for all\nfor a settlement window
  note right of AL
  Transfers
  end note

  AL -> MYSQL : 6 Update settlement data\n(excluding accounts)

  AL -> AL : 7 Settlement state\nprocessing

  AL -> TBC : 8 Invoke account creation based on\nsettlement state of each Transfer
  TBC -> TBS : 9 Create settlement accounts\n& return result
  TBS --> TBC : 9 Create settlement accounts\n& return result

  TBC --> AL : 10 Return settlement result

  AL -> MYSQL : 11 Update final settlement state\n& return result

  AL --> H : 12 Return result
  H  --> API : 13 Return result
  API --> MA : 14 Return result with\nsettlementData
end group

@enduml
```
